title: Best 20 Seconds of Your Day
excerpt: Or perhaps the best minute of your day if you're like me and watch it 3 times in a row in hysterics. My cousin Cindy sent this to me with the subject line, "we need to teach Buster and Bamboo…
body:
Or perhaps the best minute of your day if you're like me and watch it 3 times in a row in hysterics. My cousin Cindy sent this to me with the subject line, "we need to teach Buster and Bamboo how to do this". Once I stopped laughing, I couldn't even wrap my head around how one would train a dog to do this bit of awesomeness. If you are around your kids and are concerned about a certain 3 letter word that begins with a and ends with s, with an s in the middle, then I suggest you put your headphones on.


Hope it made you giggle more than a little.
